name: Cherry Cheddar Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, brown sugar, baking powder and salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together milk, egg and oil. Pour the wet ingredients over the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
3. Gently fold in the diced cherries and shredded cheddar cheese.
4. Grease a 9 1/4 x 5 1/4 x 2 3/4 inch loaf pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 55-65 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Let cool on a rack for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan and allow to cool completely before serving.
8. Serve at room temperature or toasted.
